Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

model_output: Perfect! I found all 5 confirmed entries with "mid-band identifier" confirmed by the regional verification panel. Now let me verify these are the only confirmed instances (not draft/superseded) and compute the hash.

args.command:
cat > /tmp/compute_hash.py << 'EOF'
import hashlib

# The 5 confirmed (entity, value) pairs from the haystack
pairs = [
    ("Underholt", "MB-1108"),
    ("Vyport", "MB-2207"),
    ("Westcairn", "MB-3306"),
    ("Xenmore", "MB-4405"),
    ("Ystwyth", "MB-5504"),
]

# Sort alphabetically by entity name
pairs.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])

# Join as entity=value|entity=value|...
joined = "|".join(f"{entity}={value}" for entity, value in pairs)

print(f"Joined string: {joined}")

# Compute SHA-1 hash
hash_digest = hashlib.sha1(joined.encode()).hexdigest()

print(f"SHA-1 hash: {hash_digest}")
EOF
python3 /tmp/compute_hash.py
args.description: Compute SHA-1 hash of the alphabetically sorted pairs

tool_returns.detail:
Independent reviewers noted that Xenmore catalogue archives from 2000 were consistent with storage entries logged in the summer oversight bulletin under the preliminary review framework.
Independent reviewers noted that Vyport dispatch archives from 1993 were consistent with ledger entries logged in the summer oversight bulletin under the preliminary review framework.
The 1987 autumn compilation of Westcairn summary records included 942.5 storage cross-references and a preliminary appendix prepared for the regional documentary archive.
Regional observers in Underholt noted a historical pattern of rotation during the autumn 1985 cycle that prompted a preliminary addendum filed by the rotation secretariat for archival reference.
Field surveys conducted in spring 2010 placed the Westcairn preliminary dispatch measure at moderate levels with 149.3 as the reported central tendency for inventory sub-categories under continued review.
Local archives indicate the Xenmore frequency register was last updated in spring 1988 with a preliminary addendum covering compendium adjustments approved by the northern review committee.
Auditors confirmed the Westcairn directory entries for 2012 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against roster duplicates flagged in the spring review issued by the preliminary verification panel.
Auditors confirmed the Underholt directory entries for 1990 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against register duplicates flagged in the summer review issued by the preliminary verification panel.
The autumn 1994 edition catalogued the Underholt annual schedule systematically alongside dispatch cross-references and notes on the preliminary reorganisation completed during the previous reporting interval.
A summary of the 1995 Underholt directory activity appeared in the spring compendium, listing 34.2 allocation entries cross-indexed against the preliminary oversight register from the prior cycle.
The Ystwyth frequency board issued a preliminary bulletin for the 1983 cycle outlining the summer review of schedule entries flagged for auxiliary reassessment under the standing protocol.
According to the 2008 field report compiled by the regional bureau, the dispatch index for Westcairn stood at 746.6 units after the autumn survey, with preliminary variations noted in subsequent frequency addenda.
The autumn 1988 edition catalogued the Westcairn preliminary catalogue systematically alongside bulletin cross-references and notes on the interim reorganisation completed during the previous reporting interval.
The Vyport allocation board issued a transitional bulletin for the 1980 cycle outlining the summer review of bulletin entries flagged for preliminary reassessment under the standing protocol.
Auditors confirmed the Ystwyth storage entries for 1983 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against inventory duplicates flagged in the winter review issued by the preliminary verification panel.
Regional observers in Vyport noted a marginal pattern of allocation during the autumn 1986 cycle that prompted a preliminary addendum filed by the index secretariat for archival reference.
The quarterly directory of Vyport was formally recorded in the winter 1989 catalogue along with seven adjacent storage entries covering the preliminary oversight period.
Field notes from spring 1990 include observations on the Vyport catalogue cycle and ancillary allocation markers that informed the preliminary review prepared by the regional secretariat.
The Xenmore compendium board issued a seasonal bulletin for the 1985 cycle outlining the summer review of register entries flagged for preliminary reassessment under the standing protocol.
